message:
feat: doctor analyzers, browser transport caps, WASM ABI hardening, and streaming trace improvements

Adds two new doctor sub-analyzers (invariant analyzer and lock-contention
analyzer) with structured Outputtable reports including severity-tagged
findings, risk scores, deadlock-risk patterns, and deterministic rule traces.

Extends IO capabilities with BrowserTransportKind (WebSocket/WebTransport)
and explicit BrowserTransportRequest authority envelopes, plus a full
CapabilityNegotiator for browser long-lived transports with reconnect
tracking and subprotocol support. Browser storage gets quota-aware batch
operations, storage event coalescing, and cross-tab coordination.

Hardens the WASM ABI contract layer with new boundary event types,
compatibility classification logic, and a stable signature fingerprint
for CI drift detection.

Improves RaptorQ GF256 with SIMD-optimized batch multiply paths and
lookup table generation. Enhances streaming trace with configurable
replay windows, divergence detection with causal ancestry, and snapshot
restore for lab scenarios.

Updates the CLI with richer shell completion, progress bar improvements,
ambient authority scope hardening, and migration version bump logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
